title: Chapter 4
content:
Chapter 4: Chapter 4: Mission [18+]

"Damon, are you heading toward Azure Cloud City? Perhaps we should go together if our destination is the same."

"Hm..." Damon began thinking of it for a moment.

’Stopping by Azure Cloud City wasn’t a bad plan.

There was no better location than a major city and prestigious Sects to hunt for beauties, and there will be time to get closer with her.’

’Furthermore, they were quite close to the city, which would take hours of walking, but it would only take a short moment by carriage.’

Then he gave a nod, as Damon’s lips parted in a smile.

Seeing Damon’s response, Ariel’s eyes shone brightly with anticipation.

"Come then." Ariel guides Damon toward the carriage.

[Ariel’s Interest increased by 15 points, +15 lust points.]

Alan then pulled the carriage’s door open, come closer and ask at his young miss.

"Young miss, is this truly wise? If you are spotted by others sharing a carriage with a man, people will get the wrong impression."

Hearing those words, the young miss turned to Alan.

"It all right, Alan. It just a simple etiquette. Damon already helped me and helped you repair the carriage. Giving him a ride to Azure Cloud City wouldn’t be a problem."

She added, "And it would be smearing the Aquaria Family’s reputation if we just go without returning the favor."

"I am grateful for your generosity, Lady Ariel," Damon remarked before stepping into the carriage.

It was a closed and luxurious transport, with only one window in the entrance door, covered by a long silk veil.

As soon as he sits on the padded seat opposite Ariel, he noticed dozens of protection arrays and even noise suppression arrays.

’Aquaria Family must be very rich...’ he concluded.

His old self knew a little bit about arrays, not much, but enough to detect them instantly.

His previous self-had possessed some knowledge of arrays, not extensive, but sufficient to recognize them at once.

’But if they that rich... why do they journey without any guards?’ He is wondering, but his gaze lingering on Ariel’s petite, graceful form.

She had her head lowered and keep fidgeting her body slightly.

Occasionally, Damon caught her eyes taking a peek toward him before quickly looking away.

[Ariel’s Lust increased by 5, +5 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Interest increased by 5 points, +5 lust points!]

’What the hell? I didn’t even do anything!’ Damon thought of it while looking at that notification before looking back at Ariel.

Her legs trembled slightly as she pressed them together, the blush on her face even more intense as her mind was lost in thoughts.

’Heavens... why is he so handsome, and what’s wrong with me?’ she thought internally.

’I see, so it’s the [Incubus Aura] effect, that’s why her interest keeps rising just looking at me.’ Damon made a conclusion as she looks at blushing Ariel.

"Is everything all right, Miss Ariel? You seem anxious," he asked respectfully, but his gentle voice only making her body shiver.

"Ah... I’m fine. It’s just that my leg is a bit hurt because of the accident before, it seems I twisted my ankle."

She laughed awkwardly as she saw Damon’s gaze travel down her leg.

"If you want a massage, I can give you one. I know several massage techniques for healing." He gives a pure, gentle smile, as if he had no second thoughts.

Ariel froze when she heard those words.

A mixture of emotions took over her face, about nervous and maintaining a young miss attitude, but when her eyes met his handsome face, she lost her composure and looked away, embarrassed.

[Ariel’s Interest increased by 5 points, +5 lust points.]

[Ariel’s Lust increased by 5, +5 lust points.]

"Y-You can... if you want," she muttered, her mind buzzing as she slowly raised her right leg towards Damon.

[Ding!]

Suddenly, a sound rang inside Damon’s head.

[Mission: Make Ariel Aquaria Cum]

[Reward: Incubus Eye and change relationship with Ariel Aquaria to Acquaintance.]

[Warning: If the mission fails, the Ability [Incubus Touch] will be disabled.]

[Time Limit: Before arriving at Azure Cloud City.]

’Huh? A mission? The punishment is quite scary though... As for the reward, I don’t know what that is, but I need to focus on her since it’s a golden opportunity!’

Damon cheered internally as he reached his handout toward her tiny, soft feet.

Carefully, he removed her white shoes. As his fingers sank into the soft pale skin as he caressed them.

[Tip: Use [Incubus Touch] to rise her lust faster!]

Damon read that text, and his smile widened even more as he set to work.

It was time to conquer a woman while earning some lust points!

[Ariel’s Lust increased by 10, +10 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Interest increased by 5 points, +5 lust points!]

"Nghhn~!" A long moan escaped Ariel’s lips as Damon’s strong fingers massaged her tiny, delicate feet.

"W-what is this? Why does it feel so good... " Her stuttering voice was cut off as his hands moved up, past her heels, and into her soft calves.

[Ariel’s Lust increased by 10, +10 lust points.]

Damon didn’t even pay attention to the system notifications; his eyes were completely focused on Ariel as his hands explored her legs.

He slid his fingers along the shiny skin, massaging up to her knees before returning to her heels, while using his Incubus Touch that ran along her sensitive skin.

He looked from Ariel’s legs to her face.

Her blue eyes were clouded, and her hair was messy, framing her flushed face; a thin trickle of saliva ran down her lips.

Gathering his courage, he finally reached Ariel’s thighs and pulled her closer; her feet sank into his lap, an adorable little squeal escaping her lips as her fingertips touched a large, throbbing bulge.

[Ariel’s Lust increased by 10, +10 lust points!]

"Haaah~!" she moaned softly as he grabbed her thighs.

"D-Damon... Ahhn~!" She tried to say something, but she failed, as she climaxed from the pleasure inside her.

[You caused a noble girl to climax through massage, Bonus! +50 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Lust increased by 35, +35 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Interest increased by 25 points, +25 lust points!]

[Ding!]

[Mission Completed!]
